Maarten Paes.bio: Born in the Netherlands to an Indonesian mother, Paes chose to represent Indonesia and has quickly become the undisputed number one goalkeeper. His MLS experience with FC Dallas and his Dutch footballing education have given Indonesia a goalkeeper of genuine international quality, and he has been a transformative figure in the team's historic World Cup qualification.
Maarten Paes.playingStyle: Modern, athletic goalkeeper with excellent reflexes, confident distribution with both feet, and the composure to play out from the back in possession-based systems
keyStrengths: Confident distribution and playing out from the back
Athletic ability and command of the penalty area
Maarten Paes.worldCup2026Role: Undisputed starting goalkeeper and one of Indonesia's most important players; his quality between the posts gives Indonesia a genuine foundation to compete at the World Cup level
Maarten Paes.notableFact: Born and raised in the Netherlands, he chose to represent Indonesia through his mother's heritage and has been instrumental in their historic first-ever World Cup qualification

Kevin Diks.bio: A Dutch-born defender with Indonesian heritage who has played at the highest levels of European football, including stints at Fiorentina in Serie A and FC Copenhagen in Denmark. Diks chose to represent Indonesia and his European experience has been invaluable in raising the defensive standard of the national team.
Kevin Diks.playingStyle: Experienced, tactically intelligent right-back with good positional sense developed in European football, reliable defending, and the ability to contribute in attack with quality crosses
keyStrengths: Experience at the highest level of European club football
Kevin Diks.worldCup2026Role: Starting right-back whose European experience provides Indonesia with defensive stability and tactical intelligence; his quality on the ball helps Indonesia build attacks from deep
Kevin Diks.notableFact: Played for Fiorentina in Serie A and has experience in multiple European leagues including the Danish Superliga, making him one of Indonesia's most technically accomplished defenders

Jay Idzes.bio: The cornerstone of Indonesia's defense and one of the most remarkable stories in their World Cup qualification journey. Born in the Netherlands with Indonesian roots, Idzes plays for Sassuolo in Serie A and has brought a level of defensive quality that Indonesia has never previously possessed. His aerial dominance and composure on the ball have been transformative.
Jay Idzes.playingStyle: Commanding, ball-playing center-back with outstanding aerial ability, calm distribution from the back, and the tactical intelligence to read the game at the highest European level
keyStrengths: Aerial dominance and physical presence at 190cm
Ball-playing ability and composure in possession
Tactical intelligence honed in Serie A
Jay Idzes.worldCup2026Role: Starting center-back and the defensive bedrock of the team; his Serie A quality and commanding presence give Indonesia a genuine world-class defensive foundation for their historic World Cup debut
Jay Idzes.notableFact: Plays in Serie A for Sassuolo and is valued at 10 million euros, making him Indonesia's most valuable player and a symbol of the country's transformation through naturalized players

Jordi Amat.bio: A Spanish-born center-back with Indonesian ancestry who has played in the Premier League with Swansea City and across European football. Amat's vast experience and defensive know-how have been crucial to Indonesia's improved defensive organization during their qualifying campaign.
Jordi Amat.playingStyle: Experienced, no-nonsense center-back who excels in aerial duels, aggressive marking, and organizing the defensive line with the communication skills developed through years of European football
Jordi Amat.worldCup2026Role: Experienced center-back providing defensive depth and leadership; his years of European football provide Indonesia with a voice of experience in the defensive line
Jordi Amat.notableFact: Played in the Premier League with Swansea City and has experience across multiple European leagues, making him one of the most well-traveled and experienced players in Indonesia's squad

Rizky Ridho.bio: One of the few domestically based defenders in Indonesia's squad, Rizky Ridho has been a consistent performer for Persija Jakarta and has earned regular international recognition. His growth alongside the naturalized European defenders has accelerated his development and made him a genuine World Cup-caliber defender.
Rizky Ridho.playingStyle: Developing, domestically-based center-back who has grown significantly through exposure to higher-quality teammates, combining improving positioning with physical commitment and growing confidence
keyStrengths: Familiarity with Indonesian football culture and conditions
Rizky Ridho.worldCup2026Role: Defensive depth option representing Indonesia's domestic talent alongside the naturalized European players; his improvement symbolizes the positive impact of Indonesia's squad-building approach
Rizky Ridho.notableFact: One of the homegrown Indonesian defenders in the squad who has developed significantly through playing alongside European-raised teammates in the national team setup

Sandy Walsh.bio: A Belgian-born right-back of Indonesian descent who has built a strong career in Japanese football with Yokohama F. Marinos. Walsh's pace, technical ability, and tactical intelligence have made him a key figure in Indonesia's defensive setup, and his J-League experience has given him a high level of competitive football.
Sandy Walsh.playingStyle: Quick, technically capable right-back who combines solid defensive work with attacking threat, using his pace to support attacks and his tactical awareness to maintain defensive shape
keyStrengths: Pace and attacking threat from right-back
Versatility and ability to play in multiple systems
Sandy Walsh.worldCup2026Role: Versatile defensive option who can play at right-back or wing-back; his pace and tactical intelligence give the coaching staff flexibility in their defensive setup
Sandy Walsh.notableFact: Born in Belgium and raised through Belgian football before choosing to represent Indonesia, he has thrived in the J-League with Yokohama F. Marinos, one of Japan's top clubs

Marselino Ferdinan.bio: One of the brightest homegrown talents in Indonesian football history, Marselino earned a historic move to Oxford United in the English Championship. His flair, creativity, and ability to produce moments of magic have made him a fan favorite and a symbol of Indonesian football's rising ambitions on the world stage.
Marselino Ferdinan.playingStyle: Creative, technically brilliant attacking midfielder with excellent dribbling, clever movement between the lines, and the confidence to attempt the spectacular on the biggest stages
keyStrengths: Creative vision and through ball delivery
Fearlessness and confidence in big matches
Marselino Ferdinan.worldCup2026Role: Key creative player and one of Indonesia's most talented homegrown footballers; his ability to create chances and unlock defenses is central to Indonesia's attacking ambitions at the World Cup
Marselino Ferdinan.notableFact: Made a groundbreaking move to English football with Oxford United in the Championship, becoming one of the first Indonesian players to play in English professional football

Thom Haye.bio: A Dutch-born midfielder with Indonesian heritage who has brought European midfield quality to the national team. Haye's experience in the Eredivisie with Almere City, combined with his physical attributes and passing ability, has given Indonesia a midfield presence they previously lacked at the international level.
Thom Haye.playingStyle: Tall, physically commanding midfielder with good passing range, the ability to win aerial duels in midfield, and the technical quality to control possession and dictate the tempo of matches
keyStrengths: Physical presence and aerial ability in midfield
Thom Haye.worldCup2026Role: Starting midfielder whose physical presence and passing ability provide Indonesia with control and stability in the engine room; his European experience elevates the quality of Indonesia's midfield play
Thom Haye.notableFact: Has scored important goals for Indonesia in qualifying and his Dutch football education has brought a level of tactical sophistication to the national team's midfield

Rafael Struick.bio: A young striker with Indonesian heritage who was born and raised in the Netherlands before choosing to represent Indonesia. Struick's pace, movement, and clinical finishing have made him one of Indonesia's most exciting attacking prospects, and he burst onto the scene with crucial goals during the qualifying campaign.
Rafael Struick.playingStyle: Quick, intelligent young striker with excellent movement off the ball, clinical finishing when chances arrive, and the pace to exploit spaces behind opposition defenses on the counter-attack
keyStrengths: Clinical finishing and composure in front of goal
Counter-attacking threat and runs in behind
Rafael Struick.worldCup2026Role: Starting striker and Indonesia's primary goalscoring threat; his pace and finishing quality make him the player most likely to score Indonesia's goals at the World Cup
Rafael Struick.notableFact: Scored crucial goals during Indonesia's World Cup qualifying campaign, including strikes that helped secure their historic qualification for the 2026 tournament

Egy Maulana Vikri.bio: Once hailed as the 'Indonesian Messi' after going viral with stunning goals as a teenager, Egy Maulana Vikri is one of the most naturally gifted footballers Indonesia has ever produced. Despite a career that has had its ups and downs, including a move to Polish football, his technical ability and creative genius remain unmatched among homegrown Indonesian players.
Egy Maulana Vikri.playingStyle: Technically gifted playmaker with exceptional close control, creative dribbling ability, and the vision to see passes that others cannot, operating as the creative hub of Indonesia's attack
keyStrengths: Exceptional technical ability and close control
Dribbling ability to beat defenders in one-on-one situations
Egy Maulana Vikri.worldCup2026Role: Creative attacking midfielder and Indonesia's most technically gifted homegrown player; his ability to produce moments of individual brilliance makes him a potential match-winner on the World Cup stage
Egy Maulana Vikri.notableFact: Went viral as a teenager after scoring stunning goals that earned him the nickname 'Indonesian Messi' and attracted the attention of clubs across Europe and Asia

Ragnar Oratmangoen.bio: A Dutch-born winger of Indonesian descent who has played in the Belgian Pro League with FCV Dender. Oratmangoen's pace, directness, and European experience have made him a valuable wide option for Indonesia, and his goal-scoring record from the wing demonstrates his attacking threat.
Ragnar Oratmangoen.playingStyle: Quick, direct winger who loves to take on defenders with pace and skill, cut inside to create shooting opportunities, and deliver dangerous crosses from wide positions
keyStrengths: Pace and directness on the wing
European football experience and competitive edge
Ragnar Oratmangoen.worldCup2026Role: Wide attacking option providing pace and goal threat from the left wing; his directness and European competitive experience make him a dangerous weapon in Indonesia's attacking arsenal
Ragnar Oratmangoen.notableFact: Has scored regularly for Indonesia in qualifying matches, demonstrating his ability to contribute goals from wide positions and making him one of the team's most productive attackers

Pratama Arhan.bio: One of the most recognizable Indonesian footballers globally, Pratama Arhan became famous for his spectacular long-throw technique that creates chaos in opposition penalty areas. A left-back who has played in Japan and Thailand, his unique skill set and attacking threat from set pieces have made him a cult figure in Southeast Asian football.
Pratama Arhan.playingStyle: Attacking left-back famous for his extraordinary long throw-ins that function as set pieces, combined with strong overlapping runs, decent crossing, and improving defensive awareness
keyStrengths: Extraordinary long throw-in ability that creates set-piece opportunities
Energy and willingness to support the attack
Pratama Arhan.worldCup2026Role: Starting left-back whose unique long throw-in ability gives Indonesia an unorthodox attacking weapon; his throws into the box create genuine goal-scoring opportunities from deep positions
Pratama Arhan.notableFact: His extraordinarily long throw-ins, which can reach the far post of the penalty area, have gone viral on social media and represent one of the most unique weapons any team will bring to the 2026 World Cup

Mees Hilgers.bio: A talented Dutch-born center-back with Indonesian ancestry who plays for FC Twente in the Eredivisie. Hilgers has quickly become one of Indonesia's most important defensive players, bringing Dutch defensive education, composure on the ball, and aerial dominance to the backline.
Mees Hilgers.playingStyle: Modern, ball-playing center-back with excellent aerial ability, composure in possession, and the tactical awareness developed through the Dutch football system at FC Twente
keyStrengths: Ball-playing composure from the back line
Dutch tactical education and defensive intelligence
Mees Hilgers.worldCup2026Role: Key center-back option whose Dutch football education and aerial ability strengthen Indonesia's defensive unit; his composure on the ball helps Indonesia play out from the back under pressure
Mees Hilgers.notableFact: Plays for FC Twente in the Eredivisie and has quickly become one of Indonesia's most valued defenders since choosing to represent the country through his Indonesian heritage

Ivar Jenner.bio: A young Dutch-Indonesian midfielder who has been developing through the FC Utrecht system in the Netherlands. Jenner's technical quality, passing ability, and youthful energy have earned him a place in Indonesia's World Cup squad as part of the country's investment in developing young talent.
Ivar Jenner.playingStyle: Young, technically gifted central midfielder with good passing ability, intelligence in finding space, and the Dutch football education that emphasizes composure and ball retention
keyStrengths: Dutch football education and tactical understanding
Ivar Jenner.worldCup2026Role: Young midfield talent providing squad depth and technical quality; his development in Dutch football ensures Indonesia have a capable midfielder ready to contribute as needed
Ivar Jenner.notableFact: Has been developing through FC Utrecht's respected academy system in the Netherlands and has scored for Indonesia in international competition at a young age

Nathan Tjoe-A-On.bio: A Surinamese-born left-back with Indonesian heritage who plays for Swansea City in the English Championship. Tjoe-A-On's experience in competitive English football, defensive reliability, and attacking contribution from full-back have made him a valuable addition to Indonesia's defensive options.
Nathan Tjoe-A-On.playingStyle: Solid, defensively reliable left-back with good stamina, the ability to get forward and support attacks, and the competitive hardness developed through playing in the English Championship
keyStrengths: Stamina and ability to cover the left flank
Nathan Tjoe-A-On.worldCup2026Role: Left-back option providing defensive reliability and Championship-level experience; his ability to compete in the demanding English second tier demonstrates his readiness for World Cup football
Nathan Tjoe-A-On.notableFact: Plays in the English Championship with Swansea City, one of the most physically demanding leagues in world football, giving him experience that translates directly to international competition

Justin Hubner.bio: One of the most exciting young defensive talents in Indonesian football, Hubner is a towering center-back who has earned a place at Wolverhampton Wanderers in the Premier League. At just 20, his physical attributes, composure, and potential have made him one of the most valuable young players in Southeast Asian football.
Justin Hubner.playingStyle: Tall, imposing young center-back with excellent aerial ability, growing composure on the ball, and the physical presence to compete at the Premier League level despite his young age
Justin Hubner.worldCup2026Role: Young defensive talent whose Premier League experience gives Indonesia elite-level depth at center-back; his physical attributes and development trajectory make him one of the squad's most exciting young players
Justin Hubner.notableFact: Signed with Wolverhampton Wanderers in the Premier League, making him one of the highest-profile Indonesian players in world football and a symbol of the country's growing international ambitions

Shayne Pattynama.bio: A Dutch-born left-back with Indonesian heritage who has played in the Belgian Pro League. Pattynama's European experience, tactical awareness, and solid defensive work have made him a useful option in Indonesia's squad as they look to strengthen their fullback positions with quality European-based players.
Shayne Pattynama.playingStyle: Tactical, positionally sound left-back with European competitive experience, reliable defending, and the ability to contribute in attack through overlapping runs and crosses
Shayne Pattynama.worldCup2026Role: Left-back depth option providing European experience and tactical reliability; his Belgian league background ensures Indonesia have quality cover across their defensive positions
Shayne Pattynama.notableFact: Born in the Netherlands and raised through European football, he chose to represent Indonesia and has brought valuable international experience to the squad

Calvin Verdonk.bio: An experienced Dutch-Indonesian defender who has played in the Eredivisie with NEC Nijmegen. Verdonk's versatility, defensive intelligence, and years of competitive Dutch football have made him a reliable squad member who can cover multiple positions across the backline.
Calvin Verdonk.playingStyle: Versatile, defensively intelligent fullback who can play on either side of defense, combining solid positional play with occasional attacking contributions and consistent performances
Calvin Verdonk.worldCup2026Role: Versatile defensive option who can cover right-back and other defensive positions; his Eredivisie experience and adaptability make him a valuable utility player in the squad
Calvin Verdonk.notableFact: Has been a consistent performer in the Dutch Eredivisie and his ability to play multiple defensive positions gives Indonesia's coaching staff valuable tactical flexibility

Ricky Kambuaya.bio: One of Indonesia's most talented domestically-based midfielders, Kambuaya has been a consistent performer in Liga 1 with his creative play and tireless running. Born in Papua, he represents the diverse geographic talent pool of Indonesian football and has been a regular in the national team.
Ricky Kambuaya.playingStyle: Energetic, box-to-box midfielder who combines relentless running with creative passing, good close control, and the ability to contribute at both ends of the pitch
Ricky Kambuaya.worldCup2026Role: Midfield option providing energy and creativity from the domestic league; his work rate and passion make him a useful impact substitute when Indonesia need to change the tempo of a match
Ricky Kambuaya.notableFact: Born in Papua, he represents the geographic diversity of Indonesian football talent and has been one of the most consistent domestically-based players in the national team

Eliano Reijnders.bio: The younger brother of AC Milan star Tijjani Reijnders, Eliano has Indonesian heritage through his father and chose to represent Indonesia internationally. A defensive midfielder with the Dutch football education that runs in the family, he plays for PEC Zwolle in the Eredivisie and adds quality to Indonesia's midfield.
Eliano Reijnders.playingStyle: Composed, tactically intelligent defensive midfielder with the Dutch passing and positional play instilled through his football education, providing a stabilizing presence in the middle of the park
keyStrengths: Dutch tactical education and positional play
Composure on the ball under pressure
Defensive reading of the game and interceptions
Eliano Reijnders.worldCup2026Role: Midfield anchor providing composure and tactical intelligence; his Dutch football education and family pedigree suggest enormous potential as a stabilizing force in Indonesia's midfield
Eliano Reijnders.notableFact: Is the younger brother of AC Milan and Netherlands star Tijjani Reijnders, and both brothers have Indonesian heritage through their father, though they represent different national teams

Ole Romeny.bio: A Dutch-born striker with Indonesian roots who plays for Oxford United in the English Championship. Romeny's physical presence, aerial ability, and goal-scoring instincts have given Indonesia an attacking option they have historically lacked at the international level.
Ole Romeny.playingStyle: Tall, physical striker with strong aerial ability, good hold-up play, and the goal-scoring instincts to convert chances in and around the penalty area
Ole Romeny.worldCup2026Role: Attacking option providing aerial threat and physical presence; his Championship experience and goal-scoring ability give Indonesia a different attacking dimension when needed
Ole Romeny.notableFact: Plays alongside fellow Indonesian international Marselino Ferdinan at Oxford United in the English Championship, creating a unique Indonesian connection in English football

Nadeo Argawinata.bio: An experienced domestically-based goalkeeper who has been a stalwart of Indonesian club football with Borneo FC. Nadeo's consistency, shot-stopping ability, and familiarity with Indonesian football conditions make him a reliable backup option in the goalkeeping department.
Nadeo Argawinata.playingStyle: Experienced, reliable goalkeeper with good shot-stopping ability, strong command of the penalty area, and the consistency developed through years of competitive domestic football
keyStrengths: Experience and familiarity with Indonesian football
Nadeo Argawinata.worldCup2026Role: Second-choice goalkeeper providing experienced domestic backup; his years of Liga 1 experience ensure Indonesia have a reliable option behind Maarten Paes if needed
Nadeo Argawinata.notableFact: Has been one of the most consistent goalkeepers in Indonesian domestic football and has served as a loyal backup to Maarten Paes throughout the qualifying campaign

Ernando Ari.bio: A young Indonesian goalkeeper who has been developing his skills in Liga 1 with Persebaya. His inclusion in the World Cup squad represents Indonesia's commitment to developing the next generation of homegrown goalkeeping talent alongside their established options.
Ernando Ari.playingStyle: Young, athletic goalkeeper with good reflexes, developing distribution skills, and the potential to grow into a future number one for the national team
Ernando Ari.worldCup2026Role: Third-choice goalkeeper gaining invaluable World Cup experience at a young age; his inclusion signals Indonesia's long-term investment in developing homegrown goalkeeping talent
Ernando Ari.notableFact: One of the youngest goalkeepers in any World Cup squad, his selection represents Indonesia's focus on building a sustainable pipeline of domestic talent for future tournaments

Muhammad Ferarri.bio: A domestically-based right-back from Persija Jakarta who has earned international recognition through consistent performances in Liga 1. Ferarri's energy, defensive solidity, and familiarity with Indonesian football culture make him a useful squad option.
Muhammad Ferarri.playingStyle: Energetic, committed right-back who combines solid defensive work with willingness to overlap and support attacks, bringing domestic league reliability to the squad
Muhammad Ferarri.worldCup2026Role: Domestic right-back option providing depth and squad balance; his inclusion ensures Indonesia have cover from both European and domestic leagues in every position
Muhammad Ferarri.notableFact: Represents the homegrown Indonesian talent in the squad, having developed his career entirely within the Indonesian domestic league system with Persija Jakarta

Joey Pelupessy.bio: An experienced Dutch-born midfielder with Indonesian heritage who has played in the English Championship with Sheffield Wednesday and in the Eredivisie. Pelupessy's experience, defensive midfield intelligence, and tactical understanding have made him a reliable presence in Indonesia's midfield setup.
Joey Pelupessy.playingStyle: Experienced, disciplined defensive midfielder with good positioning, efficient passing, and the tactical awareness to shield the defense and maintain the team's structural balance
Joey Pelupessy.worldCup2026Role: Experienced holding midfielder providing defensive stability and squad depth; his years in European football add a level of composure and reliability to Indonesia's midfield options
Joey Pelupessy.notableFact: Played for Sheffield Wednesday in the English Championship and has extensive experience in the Dutch Eredivisie, making him one of the most well-traveled Indonesian internationals

Ramadhan Sananta.bio: A homegrown Indonesian striker who has been a consistent scorer in Liga 1 with Persis Solo. Sananta's goal-scoring instincts, movement, and ability to poach goals in the penalty area have earned him international recognition and a place in the World Cup squad.
Ramadhan Sananta.playingStyle: Instinctive, penalty-box striker with good movement inside the area, clinical finishing at close range, and the poaching ability to score goals from half-chances
keyStrengths: Movement and positioning inside the box
Ramadhan Sananta.worldCup2026Role: Domestic attacking depth option whose goal-scoring instincts could prove valuable off the bench; his ability to score from limited opportunities makes him a potential impact substitute
Ramadhan Sananta.notableFact: Has scored important goals for Indonesia in international competition, proving that domestically-based players can still make a significant impact at the highest level
